_comment: Dynatrace Workflow — import via Automations > Workflows > Upload. Requires: (1) GitHub for Workflows app installed and connected, (2) Email notification connection configured.
title: Notify: Payment Service Issue Detection
description: When a Davis problem is detected on payment-service, creates a GitHub issue and sends an email notification.

extract_problem_details.name: extract_problem_details
extract_problem_details.description: Extract problem details from the Davis event for use in downstream tasks

create_github_issue.name: create_github_issue
create_github_issue.description: Create a GitHub issue documenting the detected problem

input.title: [Dynatrace] {{ result('extract_problem_details').problemTitle }}
input.body:
## Dynatrace Problem Detected

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Problem** | {{ result('extract_problem_details').problemTitle }} |
| **Problem ID** | {{ result('extract_problem_details').problemId }} |
| **Status** | {{ result('extract_problem_details').status }} |
| **Root Cause** | {{ result('extract_problem_details').rootCause }} |
| **Affected Entities** | {{ result('extract_problem_details').affectedEntities }} |
| **Start Time** | {{ result('extract_problem_details').startTime }} |

### Auto-Remediation
A rollback workflow has been triggered automatically via the [Auto-Remediation workflow](https://github.com/mark-dt/zurich_hot/actions/workflows/workshop-deploy-bad-release.yaml).

_Created automatically by Dynatrace Workflow_

send_email_notification.name: send_email_notification
send_email_notification.description: Send email notification about the detected problem

input.subject: [Dynatrace Alert] Payment Service: {{ result('extract_problem_details').problemTitle }}
input.body:
